join_order.rationale: 300K custkeys → tiny hash set; 7.35M orders probe it; ~10% match rate
735K orderkey build side; 33M lineitem probe; ~4 lineitems/order → ~2.94M matches

filters.dict_lookup: load dict at runtime; find i where dict[i] == 'BUILDING'; filter rows where code == i

filters.zone_map_layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=150][int32_t min, int32_t max per block]
filters.zone_map_strategy: binary search on sorted data to find last qualifying block; skip all blocks after

filters.zone_map_layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=600][int32_t min, int32_t max per block]
filters.zone_map_strategy: binary search on sorted data to find first qualifying block; skip all blocks before

customer_custkey_hashset.probing: bounded for-loop: for(uint32_t p=0; p<cap; p++) — C24
customer_custkey_hashset.purpose: semi-join: check o_custkey in qualifying customers
customer_custkey_hashset.built_by: single-threaded (300K rows trivial); read-only during orders scan

orders_orderkey_hashmap.probing: bounded for-loop: for(uint32_t p=0; p<cap; p++) — C24
orders_orderkey_hashmap.purpose: join lookup: lineitem probes o_orderkey to retrieve o_orderdate, o_shippriority
orders_orderkey_hashmap.built_by: sequential merge after parallel orders scan; read-only during lineitem scan

aggregation_hashmap.key_type: struct AggKey { int32_t l_orderkey; int32_t o_orderdate; int32_t o_shippriority; }
aggregation_hashmap.hash_fn: combine all 3 key fields: h = orderkey * 2654435761 ^ orderdate * 40503 ^ shippriority
aggregation_hashmap.probing: bounded for-loop with full key comparison — C24, C15
aggregation_hashmap.correctness: C15 — key MUST include ALL 3 GROUP BY columns
aggregation_hashmap.purpose: GROUP BY (l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority) with SUM accumulation
aggregation_hashmap.parallelism: thread-local per-thread hashmaps (each sized to full 2097152); merge at end

topk_heap.comparator: min by revenue (so top-10 highest revenue survive); tie-break by o_orderdate DESC (larger date = less preferred for ASC sort)
topk_heap.purpose: LIMIT 10 ORDER BY revenue DESC, o_orderdate ASC — O(n log 10) no full sort

phase_1_customer_scan.description: Scan 1.5M customer rows, filter mktsegment, collect c_custkey
phase_1_customer_scan.output: global custkey_hashset (built before orders scan starts)

phase_2_orders_scan.description: Zone-map guided parallel scan of orders, probe custkey_hashset (read-only), collect qualifying order rows
phase_2_orders_scan.threading: parallel morsel scan across 64 threads, ~73 blocks total after zone-map pruning
phase_2_orders_scan.output_collection: thread-local vectors of (o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority) → merge into global orders_orderkey_hashmap

phase_3_lineitem_scan.description: Zone-map guided parallel scan of lineitem, probe orders_orderkey_hashmap (read-only), accumulate revenue
phase_3_lineitem_scan.threading: parallel morsel scan across 64 threads, ~330 blocks after zone-map pruning
phase_3_lineitem_scan.aggregation: thread-local agg hashmaps (each sized to full 2097152 capacity — C9); merge sequentially at end into global agg map
phase_3_lineitem_scan.merge_note: ~735K groups, sequential merge is fast (<10ms); no atomic needed

phase_4_topk.description: Single-threaded scan of agg hashmap, maintain min-heap of 10

indexes.layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=150][int32_t min, int32_t max] per block
indexes.purpose: skip blocks where block_min >= 9204; binary search on sorted orders for last qualifying block

indexes.layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=600][int32_t min, int32_t max] per block
indexes.purpose: skip blocks where block_max <= 9204; binary search for first qualifying block

aggregation.decimal_note: l_extendedprice and l_discount stored as native double — direct multiply, no scale conversion
aggregation.implementation: thread-local open-addressing hashmaps → sequential final merge

output.topk_strategy: min_heap size 10 over agg hashmap entries

correctness_checklist.C2: Load customer/c_mktsegment_dict.txt; find i where dict[i]=='BUILDING'; filter by code==i — never hardcode 0
correctness_checklist.C9: All hash tables sized next_power_of_2(estimated_count * 2); thread-local tables sized for FULL cardinality
correctness_checklist.C15: Agg hashmap key struct includes ALL 3 GROUP BY fields: l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
correctness_checklist.C19: Zone-map skip only on o_orderdate (orders, sorted) and l_shipdate (lineitem, sorted) — both have indexes
correctness_checklist.C20: All hash table sentinel init via std::fill(..., INT32_MIN) — never memset
correctness_checklist.C24: All hash probing uses bounded for-loop: for(uint32_t p=0; p<cap; p++)
